message:
feat(harness): add DeltaJoinLeft and DeltaJoinRight differential operators

Extend DifferentialOperator with two new variants that model the
half-delta joins central to incremental view maintenance:

  - DeltaJoinLeft  — computes ΔLeft ⋈ Right (delta stream joins against
    a stable right snapshot).
  - DeltaJoinRight — computes Left ⋈ ΔRight (stable left snapshot joins
    against a delta stream).

Both variants carry the stable relation inline as Vec<WeightedRow> and
a JoinKeySpec, and dispatch to the existing delta_join_left /
delta_join_right helpers in DifferentialOperator::apply.

Three new tests verify:
  1. DeltaJoinLeft chains correctly into a subsequent Project operator.
  2. DeltaJoinRight chains correctly into a subsequent Project operator.
  3. Column-out-of-bounds errors propagate from the join key spec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
